payload.rationale: The complaint indicates the delivered item arrived damaged.

payload.english: Thanks for reaching out. We are sorry that Bluetooth Speaker arrived damaged. We will proceed with a refund for you.

payload.rationale: A replacement is the fastest resolution for this delivery issue.

payload.english: Thanks for reaching out. We will arrange a replacement for Bluetooth Speaker and keep you updated.
